description: This stylish sling bag from murcia is designed for the fashion conscious. Wear it on your shoulder and turn heads wherever you go! Height: 20 cm Width: 17 cm Made of leatherette for durability One main zipped pocket with an inner zipped pocket and a mobile pouch One insert pocket on the front On long, removable and adjustable strap for carrying ease and style Stitch detailing on the front Care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust.
